Bash(venv/bin/python - << 'EOF'
import pdfplumber, re

PDF_PATH = "/root/Projects/BypassAIGC/参考项目/TK制药公司班组长数字化培训体系优化研究_AIGC_全文报告单.pdf"

with pdfplumber.open\(PDF_PATH\) as pdf:
    # 第60页（index 60）就是有红色标记的那一页（问卷附录那段）
    for page_idx in [59, 60, 61]:
        page = pdf.pages[page_idx]
        words = page.extract_words\(extra_attrs=["non_stroking_color"]\)
        
        # 找出非黑色的词（可能是红色/棕色标记）
        colored = [\(w['text'], w['non_stroking_color']\) for w in words 
                   if w.get\('non_stroking_color'\) and w['non_stroking_color'] not in [\(0,\), \(0, 0, 0\), \(1,1,1\)]]
        
        print\(f"\\n=== Page {page_idx+1} 有颜色的词 ==="\)
        for t, c in colored[:30]:
            print\(f"  颜色{c}: {t}"\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - << 'EOF'
import fitz  # pymupdf

PDF_PATH = "/root/Projects/BypassAIGC/参考项目/TK制药公司班组长数字化培训体系优化研究_AIGC_全文报告单.pdf"

doc = fitz.open\(PDF_PATH\)

# 扫描第60-62页，用pymupdf检测红色文字
for page_idx in range\(59, 63\):
    page = doc[page_idx]
    blocks = page.get_text\("rawdict", flags=fitz.TEXT_PRESERVE_WHITESPACE\)["blocks"]
    
    print\(f"\\n=== Page {page_idx+1} 有色文字 ==="\)
    for block in blocks:
        if block.get\("type"\) != 0:
            continue
        for line in block.get\("lines", []\):
            for span in line.get\("spans", []\):
                color = span.get\("color", 0\)
                text = span.get\("text", ""\).strip\(\)
                if not text:
                    continue
                # color是整数，解码为RGB
                r = \(color >> 16\) & 0xFF
                g = \(color >> 8\) & 0xFF
                b = color & 0xFF
                # 只显示非黑非灰的（黑色是0或接近黑）
                if color != 0 and not \(r == g == b\):
                    print\(f"  RGB\({r},{g},{b}\) [{color}]: {text[:60]}"\)

doc.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - << 'EOF'
import fitz

PDF_PATH = "/root/Projects/BypassAIGC/参考项目/TK制药公司班组长数字化培训体系优化研究_AIGC_全文报告单.pdf"

doc = fitz.open\(PDF_PATH\)

# 查看第61页所有span的颜色，不过滤
page = doc[60]
blocks = page.get_text\("rawdict"\)["blocks"]

print\("=== Page 61 所有 span 颜色 \(前40个\) ==="\)
count = 0
for block in blocks:
    if block.get\("type"\) != 0:
        continue
    for line in block.get\("lines", []\):
        for span in line.get\("spans", []\):
            color = span.get\("color", 0\)
            text = span.get\("text", ""\).strip\(\)
            if text and count < 40:
                r = \(color >> 16\) & 0xFF
                g = \(color >> 8\) & 0xFF
                b = color & 0xFF
                print\(f"  color={color} RGB\({r},{g},{b}\): {text[:50]}"\)
                count += 1

doc.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python - << 'EOF'
import fitz

PDF_PATH = "/root/Projects/BypassAIGC/参考项目/TK制药公司班组长数字化培训体系优化研究_AIGC_全文报告单.pdf"

doc = fitz.open\(PDF_PATH\)

# 扫描所有页面，找到 color != 0 且 alpha == 255 的文字（排除水印）
print\("=== 全文档中非黑色正文 \(alpha=255, color!=0\) ==="\)
for page_idx in range\(len\(doc\)\):
    page = doc[page_idx]
    d = page.get_text\("dict"\)
    for block in d["blocks"]:
        if block.get\("type"\) != 0:
            continue
        for line in block.get\("lines", []\):
            for span in line.get\("spans", []\):
                color = span.get\("color", 0\)
                alpha = span.get\("alpha", 255\)
                text = span.get\("text", ""\).strip\(\)
                if text and color != 0 and alpha == 255:
                    r = \(color >> 16\) & 0xFF
                    g = \(color >> 8\) & 0xFF
                    b = color & 0xFF
                    print\(f"  P{page_idx+1} RGB\({r},{g},{b}\): {text[:80]}"\)

doc.close\(\)
EOF)
